title: GeeGaw's CE Pack
description: Texture pack that gives custom textures to enchants on lifesteal.net
body:
Custom Enchant pack for lifesteal.net! This texture pack works on versions 1.21.4+.

## Variants CIT is a required mod for this pack to work!

This pack shows custom enchant textures on lifesteal.net by changing the texture when a custom is used on an item. There are 2 versions of this pack, small tools and big tools. Small tools make tools look smaller in your hand making your screen look less crowded, while big tools uses the default tool size making your game feel more vanilla.

I will be updating this pack for every change the devs add to custom enchants! If you have any questions or suggestions join the discord server and make a ticket. 

## **Required**

Variants CIT version : 4.11.2-1.21.9 download : https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit
